# Ryan Nawrocki — Maryland State Delegate, District 7A

> Official campaign site of Ryan Nawrocki, member of the Maryland House of
> Delegates representing District 7A in eastern Baltimore County (Middle
> River, Bowleys Quarters, Perry Hall, White Marsh, Kingsville, Carney,
> Parkville, Loch Raven, Glen Arm, Cub Hill, Long Green, Baldwin). First
> elected in 2022. Ryan is a Republican, a husband, a father of six, and a
> small-business owner focused on public safety, lowering the cost of living,
> reliable energy, strong schools, and government accountability.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of Ryan Nawrocki's priorities and District 7A.
- [About](/meet-ryan): Biography, family, district roots, committee assignments.
- [Priorities](/priorities): Ten legislative priorities, with what's been delivered and what's next.
- [News & Updates](/issues): Statements and updates on legislation and local issues, plus TV appearances.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming town halls and campaign events.
- [Contact](/contact): Volunteer, order a yard sign, or reach the campaign.
- [Donate](/donate): Contribute to the campaign.

## Facts
- Office: Maryland House of Delegates, District 7A (Baltimore County)
- First elected: 2022
- Campaign contact: ryan@ryannawrocki.com · 443-814-9640
- Mailing: P.O. Box 18194, Middle River, MD 21220
- Campaign authority: Friends of Ryan Nawrocki, Lauren Nawrocki, Treasurer
